name: AAIS Universal Language
core_truth: UL is the law inside it.
definition: UL is the universal protocol-language inside AAIS that lets all modular systems connect to Jarvis through one shared, inspectable, guarded structure.
laws: The core must not be rewritten by the outside.
All modules must pass through adaptation.
plug_and_play_principle: If it can speak UL, it can join the system.
engineering_rule: Nothing enters Jarvis raw. Everything passes through adaptation. Nothing evolves outside the protocol. The core remains stabilized.
